title: I get the status code: 500 error while making API call from Matillion

posts.author: 1112 (Neelam Macwan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am trying to load Monday.com data into Snowflake using Matillion. I have tested the API URI in Postman and Monday.com Playground successfully, however, I get an error Status code received: 500 in Matillion.
Can anyone suggest how to troubleshoot or what could be the issue here? A bit of online reading suggests this is a server side error but I am not convinced because the error is caused only in Matillilon. Would be great get some help on this.

Thank you,
Neelam Macwan

posts.author: RachelGomez161999 (Rachel namia Gomez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Tips to Fix a 500 Internal Server Error
Refresh the page. This might seem obvious, but if it’s a temporary loading issue, you might find success if you refresh the page.
Come back later.
Delete your browser’s cookies.
Paste your URL into the website “Down for Everyone or Just Me.”

Greeting,
Rachel Gomez
